# Sponsor Strada.Brain

**AI-Powered Autonomous Coding Agent for Unity / Strada.Core Projects**

---

## Why Sponsor?

Strada.Brain is a standalone AI agent that reads your Unity codebase, writes code, runs builds, fixes errors, and learns from its mistakes — all through a chat interface. It is not a wrapper around an API. It is a full agent runtime with a custom PAOR (Plan → Act → Observe → Reflect) loop, persistent memory backed by SQLite + HNSW vectors, DAG-based goal decomposition, tool chain synthesis with saga rollback, and a 24/7 daemon mode.

This project represents thousands of hours of architecture, testing (3,220+ tests), and iteration. Your sponsorship funds the infrastructure costs (LLM API usage for testing, CI/CD, hosting), continued development of the agent's cognitive architecture, and expansion of channel integrations and tool capabilities.

---

## What Your Sponsorship Supports

- **Agent architecture** — The PAOR loop, failure classification, auto-replan logic, instinct lifecycle, and hybrid weighted confidence scoring that make the agent genuinely autonomous.
- **Memory & learning systems** — Three-tier auto-tiering memory (working/ephemeral/persistent), exponential decay, idle consolidation, and cross-session instinct transfer.
- **Multi-agent orchestration** — Per-channel session isolation, 4-tier task delegation, budget tracking, and agent registry management.
- **Channel integrations** — Web dashboard (React + Vite), Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, and CLI — all with streaming, media support, and interactive confirmations.
- **RAG pipeline** — C#-specific structural chunking, HNSW vector search, and weighted reranking for accurate codebase retrieval.
- **Security hardening** — 10-layer security (channel auth, rate limiting, path guard, media validation, secret sanitization, RBAC, daemon security policies).
- **Testing & reliability** — 3,220+ tests across unit, integration, and opt-in local Unity fixture flows.

---

## Sponsorship Tiers

### 🌱 Supporter — $5/month
- My sincere thanks and a mention in the project's sponsors section.
- Early access to release notes and changelog updates.

### ⚡ Backer — $15/month
- Everything in Supporter.
- Priority on GitHub Issues — bug reports and feature requests reviewed first.
- Access to a sponsors-only discussion channel.

### 🤖 Agent Builder — $50/month
- Everything in Backer.
- Your name/logo in the README sponsors section.
- Monthly development update with agent architecture insights and roadmap.
- Vote on feature priority (new tools, channel integrations, learning improvements).

### 🏢 Studio — $150/month
- Everything in Agent Builder.
- Your studio name/logo prominently displayed in README and web portal.
- Direct support channel for setup, configuration, and customization (response within 48 hours).
- Early access to pre-release builds and experimental features.
- Quarterly call to discuss your workflow and influence roadmap direction.

### 💎 Enterprise — $500/month
- Everything in Studio.
- Dedicated onboarding session for your team's workflow.
- Custom tool development consideration (scoped to agent capabilities).
- Custom SOUL.md personality configuration for your team's use case.
- Co-development credits in release changelogs.

## One-Time Contributions

One-time sponsorships of any amount are welcome. They directly offset LLM API costs for testing, CI infrastructure, and development time.

## How Funds Are Used

| Category | Allocation |
|---|---|
| Development & agent architecture | 50% |
| LLM API costs (testing & CI) | 20% |
| Testing infrastructure | 15% |
| Documentation & community | 15% |

## Current Stats

- **3,220+** tests passing
- **40+** built-in tools (file ops, git, .NET build, Strada code generation, search, agent interaction)
- **6** chat channels (Web, Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, CLI)
- **13** LLM providers supported (Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Groq, Qwen, Kimi, MiniMax, Mistral, Together, Fireworks, Gemini, Ollama, and more)
- **388** commits and counting
- **10-layer** security architecture
- **8** language localizations (EN, TR, ZH, JA, KO, DE, ES, FR)
